Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 28 

CONTRACT_ID_16 (reference year) 

LABEL: Contract Identifier for Reference Year 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique number CMS assigns to each contract that a plan has with CMS. This was 
the contract ID for the plan in 2016 (the reference year). It may or may not be the same as the 
contract ID in the previous year (2015).
